note: Student draws a 2-level decision tree. OCR captures 13 fields. Root node: feature (B1) and threshold (B2) with branch labels (B3=evet, B4=hayır). Left subtree inner node: feature (B6) and threshold (B7) with branch labels (B8=evet, B9=hayır) and leaves (B10, B11). Right subtree leaf: B13. B5 and B12 are additional leaves that may appear depending on tree shape. Partial 0.5 on any threshold item if variable is correct but operator is wrong or missing. tree_structure grades the overall validity holistically.

components.idea: valid food feature from dataset (şeker, yağ, enerji, protein)

WS6_root_feature.note: Any valid food feature name earns full credit. Consistency with threshold and leaves checked in tree_structure.

components.idea: numeric threshold value consistent with root feature
evet/yes/true branch correctly labeled (evet, yes, true, doğru, pozitif)
hayır/no/false branch correctly labeled (hayır, no, false, yanlış, negatif)
valid food feature different from root (şeker, yağ, enerji, protein; must differ from WS6_B1)
numeric threshold value consistent with inner feature
evet branch correctly labeled (evet, yes, true, doğru)
hayır branch correctly labeled (hayır, no, false, yanlış)
recommended labels on positive paths (tavsiye edilir, tavsiye edilebilir, önerilir, uygun)
not-recommended labels on negative paths (tavsiye edilmez, tavsiye edilemez, önerilmez, uygun değil)
leaf labels consistent with branch logic and tree paths

WS6_leaves.example_answer: B10: Tavsiye edilir | B11: Tavsiye edilmez | B13: Tavsiye edilmez

components.idea: at least 2 different features used across the tree
all leaf nodes have class labels
branch operators are consistent (≤ and > paired, or < and >= paired)

WS6_tree_structure.example_answer: Root splits on şeker ≤ 10; left subtree splits on yağ ≤ 5; all leaves labeled.
